title: cymbopogon filipendulus
intro: Cymbopogon filipendulus, also known as East Indian lemon grass, is a species of grass native to Southeast Asia, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and citrusy aroma. The medicinal properties of Cymbopogon filipendulus include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties, which make it useful for treating a range of health issues. The health benefits of this plant include reducing stress and anxiety, improving digestion, and alleviating symptoms of colds and flu. Cymbopogon filipendulus can be prepared as an essential oil, tea, or powder, which can be used in aromatherapy, cooking, or as a natural remedy for various health conditions.
